config.content:
# LLM Stability Experiment - Main Configuration
# All model names and paths are externalized; no hardcoded values in source.

models:
  - name: "llama3.2"
    ollama_identifier: "llama3.2"
    quantization: "default"
  - name: "mistral"
    ollama_identifier: "mistral"
    quantization: "default"
  - name: "phi3"
    ollama_identifier: "phi3:mini"
    quantization: "default"

decoding:
  temperature_values: [0.0, 0.3, 0.7]
  top_p: 0.9
  top_k: 40
  repeat_penalty: 1.1
  max_tokens: 256

stochastic:
  n_samples: 3

bootstrap:
  iterations: 1000
  confidence_level: 0.95

output:
  log_path: "logs/responses.jsonl"
  results_path: "results"
  figures_subdir: "figures"
  tables_subdir: "tables"

ollama:
  base_url: "http://localhost:11434"
  timeout_seconds: 120
  max_retries: 3

reproducibility:
  client_version: "1.0"
